title: [ExportVerilog] Option to disable always comb fusion

features.name: multiple always_comb blocks with cross-block reg dependency
features.description: Code should include two separate always_comb procedural blocks where one block reads a reg variable that the other block assigns, demonstrating how cross-block dependencies get incorrectly fused

features.name: always_comb with read_before_write ordering
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a variable is referenced in an expression before being assigned within the same procedural block, simulating the semantic error caused by incorrect fusion
